summary: FIX-1: Positions tab Realized P&L now reads authoritative value from state pnl.realized (fallback state.bankroll.net_pnl), instead of summing sliced closed trades.
FIX-2: Added compact mark_source indicator on position cards for fallback marks: 'mark REST' and 'mark POLL' chips; stream remains hidden/subtle.
FIX-3: R25 tile sublabel now uses s.r25.sample_size instead of missing s.total_closed.

positions_realized_pnl.before: Computed from closed.slice(0,10) sum in renderPositionsTab (observed +$43.62 in reverify report)
positions_realized_pnl.after: Computed from Number(state?.pnl?.realized ?? state?.bankroll?.net_pnl ?? 0) (authoritative; aligns with /api/state and /api/bankroll)

mark_source_display.before: mark_source field existed on objects but was not rendered on cards
mark_source_display.after: Fallback mark sources render compact chip: mark REST (rest_fallback) / mark POLL (poll_fallback); stream hidden

approval_recommendation.reason: All three scoped dashboard.html defects fixed with narrow changes; authoritative P&L source adopted; fallback mark_source visibility added; R25 sublabel now uses valid field.
